title: UIAO Unified Key Security Indicator (KSI) Schema
description: Schema for defining a single Key Security Indicator (KSI) used for automated evidence generation and validation in UIAO-Core.

ksi_id.description: Stable, unique identifier for this KSI within UIAO-Core (e.g., KSI-AC-01).

title.description: Short human-readable title for the KSI.

description.description: Detailed description of what this KSI measures and why it matters.

severity.description: Impact level if this KSI fails.

family.description: Primary NIST 800-53 Rev 5 control family this KSI belongs to.

controls.description: Array of NIST 800-53 Rev 5 control identifiers this KSI maps to.

items.description: NIST control ID (e.g., AC-2, AC-2(1), SC-7(3)).

data_sources.description: Data sources required to evaluate this KSI.

validation_logic_ref.description: Path or URI reference to the YAML rule file that defines the executable validation logic for this KSI.

freshness_window.description: ISO 8601 duration indicating how recent the evidence must be to consider this KSI valid (e.g., PT24H, P7D).

expected_patterns.description: Human-readable assertion strings describing the expected security posture or behavior this KSI enforces.

items.description: Human-readable assertion (e.g., 'All privileged sign-ins must be MFA + compliant device + overlay identity match').

evidence_output.description: Contract describing how evidence for this KSI is emitted into OSCAL and Quarto.

oscal_evidence_type.description: OSCAL evidence artifact type this KSI produces.

quarto_snippet_type.description: Type of Quarto snippet generated for this KSI.

quarto_snippet_template.description: Optional reference to a Quarto template or partial used to render this KSI's evidence.

provenance.description: Provenance envelope describing how this KSI definition was produced or last modified.

timestamp.description: Timestamp when this KSI definition was last updated.

collector_id.description: Identifier of the tool, pipeline, or process that last wrote this KSI definition.

hash.description: Content hash of the KSI definition (e.g., SHA-256 of the canonical JSON/YAML representation).

version.description: Version of this KSI definition, preferably semantic versioning.

tags.description: Optional free-form tags for grouping, filtering, or classification.

notes.description: Optional implementation notes, caveats, or guidance for authors and reviewers.

enabled.description: Whether this KSI is currently active in validation pipelines.
